apps.name: Feishu
apps.description: Feishu local shell storage on Windows, focused on hash-named aha user directories.
warnings: This tool remains read-only and will not delete Feishu data for you.
Hash-named directories under aha/users are shown as delete candidates based on your requested policy.

paths.description: Hash-named Feishu aha user directories under LarkShell.
paths.safe_to_clean_hint: These hash-named directories are treated as delete candidates in this workflow, but the scanner remains read-only.
paths.warning: Review the matched directories before manual cleanup.

paths.description: Hash-named Feishu aha user directories under Feishu.
paths.safe_to_clean_hint: These hash-named directories are treated as delete candidates in this workflow, but the scanner remains read-only.
paths.warning: Review the matched directories before manual cleanup.

paths.safe_to_clean_hint: Logs are usually safer to review and prune than the full data directory.
Logs are usually safer to review and prune than the full data directory.
